articles.title: Newlywed found hanging in Lucknow; family alleges torture over dowry, car demand
articles.description: A 28-year-old newlywed woman was found dead at her in-laws' home in Lucknow, six months after her marriage. Her family alleges dowry harassment and demands for a car led to her death. Police have detained the husband and father-in-law for questioning as an investigation into suicide or dowry-related violence is underway.

articles.title: 'Seriously concerned': Quad joint statement flags water cannons, blocked ships in South and East China Seas

The ministers also addressed online scams and the situation in Myanmar.

articles.title: Live: Sensex, Nifty flat in May series; Pharma index top sectoral gainer | Closing Bell
articles.description: Indian equity markets witnessed a volatile session on monthly expiry day as benchmark indices came under selling pressure. The Nifty 50 failed to sustain the 23,900 level, while the Sensex dropped over 500 points, ending around 0.7% lower. Market breadth remained weak, reflecting broad-based caution, although the India VIX continued to cool, indicating easing near-term volatility expectations. Sectorally, financial and realty stocks faced significant pressure, weighing on overall sentiment. However, broader markets showed relative resilience and managed to outperform the benchmarks. On the sectoral front, the metal index emerged as the top gainer, supported by selective buying in commodity-linked stocks. Among Nifty 50 constituents, gainers included Adani Enterprises, Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles (TMPV), and Bajaj Auto, which helped cushion some of the downside. On the losing side, Apollo Hospitals, Titan, and Trent were among the major drags on the index. Overall, the session reflected profit-booking and sectoral rotation amid expiry-led volatility.

articles.title: How Russia’s Kh-101 missile uses decoy flares to slip past air defence shields
articles.description: Russia is upgrading its Kh-101 cruise missiles with advanced countermeasures to counter Ukraine's air defences. Recent footage shows these missiles deploying flares and potentially radar-confusing chaff. Despite these efforts, Ukraine claims high interception rates, though Russia's hypersonic missiles like Oreshnik pose a greater future threat.

articles.description: Wix is preparing for its largest-ever layoffs, cutting approximately 1,000 employees, or 20% of its workforce. This significant downsizing follows a challenging first quarter, marked by a stock decline and increasing redundancy of roles due to AI advancements. Despite double-digit revenue growth, the company reported a net loss and a drop in cash flow, with operating expenses significantly increasing.

articles.title: India-Canada eye $50 bn trade as CEPA talks go
